title: Build curated Gemini maintenance evidence packet
goal: Build a narrow, deterministic evidence packet for Gemini maintenance scans so Gemini reads bounded Cabinet evidence rather than crawling unrestricted repositories.

acceptance.assertion: The evidence packet has a manifest listing exact input files, refs or commits, hashes where applicable and exclusion rules.
Initial inputs are limited to Cabinet agent docs, relevant contracts, nodes, edges, claims, external dump sources, deterministic maintenance report and Frontier no-effect rules.
The packet excludes secrets, private logs, unrestricted runtime data and any broad repository crawl.
acceptance.verifier: negative tests or explicit review checklist

acceptance.assertion: JSON/schema/path/hash/freshness checks remain deterministic inputs; Gemini is not used as the primary validator for those checks.
